tasks.description: Add token budget constants to orchestrator config
tasks.context: Create MINIMAX_TOKEN_BUDGET constant set to 3600 (4500 * 0.8) and BUFFER_PERCENTAGE=0.2 in backend/src/services/orchestrator-config.ts. Export these for use in orchestrator service. Document why 20% buffer prevents truncation.

tasks.description: Apply 20% token reduction to MiniMax coding requests
tasks.context: In backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts, import MINIMAX_TOKEN_BUDGET from config. Locate MiniMax API call for backend-core agent. Change max_tokens from current value to 3600. Add comment explaining truncation prevention. Ensure frontend agents keep existing limits.

tasks.description: Add truncation detection to quality gate validator
tasks.context: In backend/src/services/quality-gate-config.ts, add check for output length vs max_tokens ratio. If output is >95% of token limit, flag as potential truncation risk. Return validation warning with token usage stats. This prevents future silent failures.

tasks.description: Add token usage logging to orchestrator
tasks.context: In backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts, after MiniMax response, log actual tokens used vs budget to logger. Include agent type and task complexity. Use backend/src/lib/logger.ts. Format: 'MiniMax tokens: {used}/{budget} ({percentage}%) - agent: {type}'. Enables monitoring of buffer effectiveness.
